name: Casino Heist: Escape Room
short_description: You've just planned your next heist, the casino owned by the ruthless man who betrayed your mentor. As an experienced thief, solve puzzles and find clues to crack the advanced security systems. Will you be able to open the vault?
detailed_description:
"You have gathered your team to rob the man who betrayed your mentor. Will you be able to teach him a lesson?"

Casino Heist is an escape room that will test your skills as a thief. Solve puzzles and find clues to crack the advanced security systems with the help of your team.

Will you be able to open the vault?

Features

  • Explore the different rooms of the casino, from the gaming area to the staff-only areas, such as the count room or the surveillance room.
  • Examine everything: read documents, examine all kinds of objects you would find in a casino and find clues to riddles. Need help with a puzzle? No problem, the game provides a hint system that you can use at any time.
  • Reveal hidden clues using tools such as an ultraviolet flashlight or special lenses to see marked playing cards.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
